title: Ocean Optimization
description: A mod pack revolving around optimization and small, Quality of Life changes.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40037bc155e89404ce736115d0751e19259e01d3.png)
A simple and well refined modpack focused on optimizing Minecraft. This mod pack is versatile and can increase the performance on most personal computers. If you have any suggestions for the continuation of this project feel free to leave them in the _'suggestions'_ channel in our Discord!
